home.title: One additive. Five functions. Zero compromise.
home.description: EPM replaces 3–5 separate chemical additives with a single multifunctional solution — reducing costs, emissions, and operational complexity for refinery-scale customers.
home.fn1Desc: Breaks water-oil emulsions. Eliminates electrostatic desalters.
home.fn2Desc: 30–40% sulfur reduction without hydrogen or high-pressure reactors.
home.fn4Desc: NOx, CO, SO₂ far below IMO 2020 and EPA Tier 4 limits.
home.fn5Desc: Eliminates microbial contamination and infrastructure corrosion.
home.ctaTitle: Calculate the ROI for your operation
home.ctaDesc: Enter your throughput and crude grade to estimate potential annual savings.
home.disclaimer: All performance data is preliminary and subject to independent verification.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.desc: Technical or commercial questions? Send us a message and we will respond within one business day.
contact.messagePh: Share context about your refinery, capacity, and current additive approach.
contact.successMsg: Thank you — your message has been received.
contact.errorMsg: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

pilot.title: Request a Pilot Program
pilot.desc: Refineries processing 50,000+ bbl/day can request participation in the EPM pilot program. We will review your details and follow up within 2 business days.
pilot.crudePh: Light sweet, medium sour, heavy sour…
pilot.successMsg: Thank you — the team will review your pilot request.
pilot.errorMsg: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
